purpose: Production record for ChatGPT image generation. Completed entries must not be generated again; held entries require an explicit future decision before generation.

globalRules.style: Premium cinematic cyber-gothic dark symphonic metal photography. Void black, structural violet, restrained cyan, pulse crimson, and witness gold. Human-led visual authorship, realistic materials, controlled signal distortion, no generic neon-city cyberpunk.
globalRules.publicPresentation: All human characters are clearly adult and wear structured, fully opaque public-facing stagewear. Character sheets define identity, not mandatory exposure or prompt-unsafe detail.
globalRules.textRule: Do not render titles, captions, logos, watermarks, fake UI words, or random typography. Website text remains HTML/CSS.
globalRules.groupRule: Use only the sheets for characters present. Preserve fixed left-to-right order, distinct faces, hair, body classes, materials, and clothing languages. Never duplicate or merge characters.
globalRules.mobileRule: Every -M item is a true vertical recomposition. Do not crop the desktop image.

identityLocks.CALLIZTO: Adult human frontwoman; long straight black hair with full bangs and rich purple highlights or lower lengths; blue non-glowing eyes; pale skin; mature commanding presence; structured opaque gothic stagewear.
identityLocks.SERAPHINA: Fully human adult around 25; long platinum-blonde hair with soft pink highlights and full bangs; blue non-glowing eyes; precise elegant presence; no robotic body or visible implants; opaque black and violet stagewear.
identityLocks.SCARLETT: Adult human; long vivid red hair with bangs; emerald non-glowing eyes without runes; tattooed arms; athletic feminine build; commanding drummer energy; opaque structured gothic-metal stagewear.
identityLocks.ADA: Elegant feminine synthetic; long silver-white hair; pale human-readable face; cool light-blue non-glowing eyes; thin refined glasses; white ceramic and silver mechanisms with restrained cyan accents; calm analytical presence.
identityLocks.NYX: Ada's black-violet synthetic counterpart; long straight black hair; pale human-readable face; deep violet lipstick; glossy black ceramic chassis; restrained embedded violet seams; identity-locked black glasses with wide angular temple arm and violet side accent; no magic or lightning.
identityLocks.ASTRA: Hooded and lower-face-masked synthetic guardian; dark hair partly visible; pale silver-blue non-glowing eyes; burgundy, charcoal, gunmetal, aged gold and obsidian; solemn protective tech-goth architecture; hood and mask remain present.
identityLocks.MISALIGNMENT: Tall hostile synthetic around 195 cm; black and dark gunmetal integrated body; restrained violet internal structure; sterile unemotional correction logic; controlled fragmentation only; not Nyx, not a demon, not a giant monster.

completed.purpose: Signal the mythology and its central sterile threat.
completed.instruction: Create a vertical mythic archive scene with The Misalignment standing alone in a collapsing data cathedral. Its black gunmetal body remains controlled and human-scale, with restrained violet internal conduits and small fragments of corrupted archive matter dissolving around one side. Keep the figure ominous and precise, never monstrous.
completed.camera: Low but restrained three-quarter full figure, 55mm feel.
completed.lighting: Sterile overhead white with underlit violet seams and deep black falloff.
completed.negativeSpace: Keep the lower 45 percent comparatively quiet for card text.
completed.cropSafe: Head and shoulders stay within the upper central third; preserve full silhouette.

completed.purpose: Introduce the three Sisters as distinct forces within one production system.
completed.instruction: Create a vertical Forge chamber portrait. Fixed left to right: Ada in white ceramic and cyan structure, Nyx in glossy black ceramic and restrained violet seams with her exact wide-temple glasses, Astra hooded and masked in burgundy, gunmetal and aged gold. They stand around a dark worktable with no text or holographic words. Keep them distinct and equally authoritative.
completed.camera: Waist-up triangular group, eye level, 50mm feel.
completed.lighting: Ada cyan rim, Nyx violet internal signal, Astra warm witness-gold edge light.
completed.negativeSpace: Dark lower 40 percent for gateway copy.
completed.cropSafe: All faces remain in the upper central half; Astra hood and mask fully visible.

completed.purpose: Show the Sisters operating the Forge as a working system.
completed.instruction: Create a wide Forge work scene. Fixed left to right: Ada calibrates a white-cyan archive mechanism, Nyx evaluates a black-violet interface with her exact glasses, Astra stands masked and hooded as protective witness. The chamber mixes dark cathedral metalwork with practical production technology. No magic and no fake text.

completed.negativeSpace: Keep the right 38 percent darker and calmer for the feature copy.
completed.cropSafe: All three figures stay within central 60 percent and remain separable.
mustNotAppear: Nyx axe unless subtle and symbolic
